question:
Will Alejandro Kirk be named the 2025 World Series MVP?

Description: This polymarket will resolve according to the player who is named the 2025 World Series MVP.

If the 2025 World Series MVP is not announced by May 1, 2026, this market will resolve to “Other”.

The primary resolution source for this market will be official announcements from MLB. A consensus of credible reporting may also be used.

evidences.title: 2025 World Series MVP VOTE | MLB.com
evidences.content: will be announced. Voting will open on or around the start of the sixth (6th) inning of a possible 2025 MLB World Series clinching game. If the 2025 MLB World Series is not clinched after the completion of such game, all votes cast during that voting period will be purged and a new voting period will start on or around the start of the sixth (6th) inning of the following 2025 MLB World Series game. [...] To voice who you think should be the 2025 Willie Mays World Series MVP presented by Chevrolet, select one (1) player beginning on or around the start of the sixth (6th) inning of a possible 2025 MLB World Series clinching game through the end of such game. To vote, click on a player from the roster of either the American League Champion or National League Champion. The fan voting on MLB.com accounts for a portion of the official determination of the 2025 Willie Mays World Series MVP, alongside broadcast rightsholders, the Baseball Writers Association of America (BBWAA) and other media members on site at the Fall Classic. Following the conclusion of the 2025 MLB World Series, the 2025 Willie Mays World Series MVP presented by Chevrolet will be announced. Voting will open on or ar...
